zh.lifeSummary: 當ALISON WHITFIELD於1413年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德懷特菲爾德時，她的父親Sir Matthew Whitfield25歲，母親Agnes Ogle4歲。她於1433年之前與Sir Thomas Featherstone結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年5月29日在英國英格蘭達勒姆達勒姆享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当ALISON WHITFIELD于1413年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德懷特菲爾德时，她的父亲Sir Matthew Whitfield25岁，母亲Agnes Ogle4岁。她于1433年之前与Sir Thomas Featherstone结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1476年5月29日在英国英格兰達勒姆達勒姆享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: WHITFIELD
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Whitfield, for example in Derbyshire, Gloucestershire, Kent, Northamptonshire, and Northumberland, or Whitefield in Lancashire and the Isle of Wight, named with Old English hwīt ‘white’ + feld ‘open country’, probably because of their chalky soil.

History: Henry Whitfield (1597–c. 1657), preacher and scholar, came from Mortlake, Surrey, England (now part of Greater London) to New Haven, CT, in 1639 and was one of the first settlers in Guilford, CT. He had ten children, some of whom he left in CT when he returned to England in 1650, where he died.

variants.name: Whitfill
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Whitfield  .

nameMeanings.name: ALISON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a very common medieval name, a Norman French diminutive of   Alice .  Despite its early popularity, it became quite rare in England in the 16th century. However, it survived in Scotland, with the result that until its revival in England in the 20th century it had a strongly Scottish flavour.

variants.name: Allison
meanings: Respelling of   Alison .  This is the more common form of the name in the United States.

variants.name: Alysoun
meanings: Medieval spelling of   Alison  , which has enjoyed some currency since the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When ALISON WHITFIELD was born in 1413, in Whitfield, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Matthew Whitfield, was 25 and her mother, Agnes Ogle, was 4. She married Sir Thomas Featherstone before 1433. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 29 May 1476, in Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque ALISON WHITFIELD est née en 1413, à Whitfield, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Matthew Whitfield, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Ogle, avait 4 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Featherstone avant 1433. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1476, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als ALISON WHITFIELD 1413 in Whitfield, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Matthew Whitfield 25 und ihre Mutter Agnes Ogle 4. Sie hat vor 1433 Sir Thomas Featherstone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1476 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando ALISON WHITFIELD è nata il nel 1413 nel Whitfield, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Matthew Whitfield, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agnes Ogle, aveva 4 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Featherstone prima del 1433. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 maggio 1476, nel Durham, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: ALISON WHITFIELDが1413年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウィトフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Matthew Whitfieldは25歳，母Agnes Ogleは4歳であった。1433年以前にSir Thomas Featherstoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年5月29日にイギリスイギリスダルハムダルハムで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: ALISON WHITFIELD(이)가 1413년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 휘트필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Matthew Whitfield(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Ogle(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 1433년 이전 Sir Thomas Featherstone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 5월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 뒤람에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando ALISON WHITFIELD nasceu em 1413, em Whitfield, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Matthew Whitfield, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Ogle, tinha 4 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Featherstone antes 1433. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1476, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда ALISON WHITFIELD родилась в 1413 г. в местности уитфиелд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Matthew Whitfield было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Ogle, 4. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Featherstone перед 1433 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 мая 1476 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando ALISON WHITFIELD nació en 1413, en Whitfield, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Matthew Whitfield, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes Ogle, tenía 4 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Featherstone antes de 1433. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1476, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
